decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly casting low-cost aggressive creatures and burning spells to quickly reduce the opponent's life total. It aims to maintain a relentless pace of damage output through efficient creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, while also using burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast to finish off opponents. The inclusion of cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Cursed Scroll adds additional direct damage potential. Overall, the deck's strategy is to apply constant pressure and fast damage to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, while also utilizing graveyard recursion and card advantage. The deck aims to apply early pressure with efficient creatures like Ravenous Rats and Tempting Wurm, backed up by removal spells like Smother and Vendetta. In addition, the deck uses discard spells such as Duress and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of cards like Phyrexian Furnace and Skeletal Scrying allows for graveyard interaction and card advantage, giving the deck resilience in longer games.

The deck focuses on using Phyrexian Dreadnought alongside Stifle to cheat a 12/12 creature into play for only one mana. The rest of the deck is filled with blue counter spells and card draw to protect the combo and find the necessary pieces. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while assembling the combo to quickly take control of the game.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly and efficiently get a Sutured Ghoul onto the battlefield by using cards like Dark Ritual and Shallow Grave to cheat out a Phyrexian Dreadnought. By using cards like Lim-Dûl's Vault and Stifle to manipulate the top of the library and counter opponent's threats, the deck aims to win the game in a single explosive turn. With cards like Buried Alive and Duress to set up the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan, this deck focuses on assembling its pieces and executing a powerful combo finish.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive Goblin creatures. Utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey to cheat creatures onto the battlefield for free, alongside powerful cards like Goblin Ringleader to draw more Goblin cards, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish off the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. With a mix of efficient creatures and disruptive spells like Naturalize, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to lock down the opponent using Stasis and other control spells while dealing damage with Black Vise. The deck includes counterspells like Counterspell and Foil to protect the combo pieces, as well as card draw with Impulse and Gush. Chain of Vapor and Powder Keg provide additional removal options, while Forsaken City allows for extra mana generation. Overall, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and prevent them from being able to effectively play cards, ultimately leading to victory through attrition.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive Goblin creatures. The deck includes various Goblin cards that provide card advantage, mana acceleration, and direct damage to the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron helps to quickly assemble the Goblin horde, while cards like Goblin Piledriver and Siege-Gang Commander provide powerful combat abilities. This deck aims to capitalize on early aggression and maximize damage output to quickly defeat the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize or gain control of the game.

This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo involving Daru Spiritualist, Task Force, and Shaman en-Kor to create a large creature with infinite toughness. The combo relies on the interaction between these creatures and cards like Mother of Runes and Swords to Plowshares for protection. The deck also includes support cards like Eladamri's Call and Living Wish to search for key pieces and maintain consistency. The goal is to quickly set up the combo and overwhelm the opponent with a massive creature that can be difficult to deal with.

The focus of this deck is on using counterspells and removal cards to control the game and disrupt opponent's plans. It aims to stall the game, control the board with synergy between creatures and spells, and gradually build card advantage through draw spells. The deck's win condition involves using efficient threats like Phyrexian Dreadnought and Mishra's Factory to close out the game once the opponent's resources have been exhausted. The deck's mana base is streamlined with a heavy emphasis on Islands for consistency in casting its spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing the combo between Opalescence and Replenish to overwhelm the opponent with a massive board presence. Attunement and Intuition help to set up the combo pieces, while Parallax Tide and Parallax Wave offer control over the board state. Other cards like Swords to Plowshares and Mana Leak provide additional utility and disruption. The deck aims to stall the game until it can assemble its combo pieces and win the game in one big turn.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive Goblin creatures. By utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to quickly bring out powerful Goblin creatures such as Goblin Piledriver and Siege-Gang Commander, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Goblin Sharpshooter provides removal options to control the board, while cards like Goblin King and Goblin Warchief help boost the overall strength of the Goblin army. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive playstyle, with lands like Rishadan Port and Wasteland providing disruption to the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on aggressive creatures like Terravore and Exalted Angel, supported by land destruction with cards like Wasteland and Armageddon. Meddling Mage and Seal of Cleansing provide additional disruption for the opponent's strategy. Weathered Wayfarer helps to find crucial lands like Treetop Village or Rishadan Port, while Sylvan Library helps with card draw. The deck aims to quickly apply pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan through aggressive creatures and land destruction, ultimately overwhelming them before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by countering opponent's spells, disrupting their strategy with bounce and land destruction effects, and gaining card advantage with card draw spells like Accumulated Knowledge and Fact or Fiction. It also includes a mix of creature lands for additional threats while maintaining board control. The key strategy is to stall the game until the control player can establish a dominant position and secure victory through card advantage and controlled aggression.

This deck focuses on using control elements like counterspells, removal, and card draw to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent. The key strategy is to control the board with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Wrath of God while generating card advantage with Accumulated Knowledge and Fact or Fiction. Parallax Tide and Humility can also disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to stabilize the game with its land base, using utility lands like Wasteland and Dust Bowl to disrupt the opponent's mana base while generating threats with Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave.
